title: Browningia microsperma
taxonomy: Browningia microsperma is classified within the family Cactaceae. This plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Browningia. It is a species of cactus native to South America. Browningia microsperma is a small to medium-sized cactus with short, white spines. It is a type of columnar cactus, characterized by its cylindrical stems and small flowers.
